name: Ken & Laura's Amazing Impromptu Sweet-n-Sour
recipeIngredient: Canola oil (sesame oil would work well too)
1 1/2 cups Broccoli (florets and stems, cut into small pieces)
1 small Can pineapple chunks (unsweetened, be sure to save the juice)
1 Ripe mango, peeled, seeded, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------
SAUCE
1 1/2 cups Tamari
Pineapple juice (leftover from the can)
3 tablespoons Cornstarch (or enough to make desired thickness)
2 tablespoons Water
2 teaspoons Grated fresh ginger
1. Heat about 1/2 to 2/3 cup oil in a wok until it coats all the veggies but not making them slimy.
2. Add scallions and garlic, cooking until garlic turns brown.
3. Add pea pods, squash, and broccoli; cook for 3-5 minutes.
4. Add bean sprouts, water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and red bell pepper; cook for a few more minutes until veggies are slightly tender but still crisp.
5. Add pineapple, oranges, and mango; cook about a minute.
6. Stir in the sauce; when the sauce bubbles, remove from heat. Serve over rice. Yum!
